description.value: Price 10,330 gp; Slot none; CL 8th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION This +2 shortbow is etched with equine imagery. Whenever the bow is fired from a mount, the wielder’s mount gains a +2 deflection bonus to its AC until the start of the wielder’s next turn. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,330 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells shield of faith, warp wood
